title: Bleached
description: A paler and more dramatic palette for everyone's favorite block: Dead Coral!
body: Ever wanted a more realistic depiction of ecological catastrophe in your server? Ever been mildly annoyed by smatterings of nonsensical gray blocks in so-called asthetic builds? Ever remember dead coral exists? If you answered yes to any of the above, this may be the resource pack for you! Swap that bland, stonelike gray for a ghostly white, and with built-in compatability with Upgrade Aquatic's additional corals, unalive slow-growing sessile cnidarians like never before!
